title: Title
question: Question

title: Element Reference
question: Site reference or name for this element (as per schematic).

title: Location
question: Where is this element located? (building / room / access route)

title: Access Arrangements
question: How is access gained? Note keys / fobs / permits required.

title: Element Overview Photo
question: Take a wide photo showing the whole element / room.

title: Schematic Available
question: Is an as-installed schematic available on site?

title: Labelling
question: Is pipework and equipment labelling clear and adequate (flow/return arrows and equipment IDs)?

title: General Condition
question: General condition of this element.

title: Safe Access
question: Is the element safe to access and work on (lighting / drainage / trip hazards / confined space)?

title: Visible Leaks
question: Are there any visible leaks or historic leak staining?
notes: Record OK when no leaks. HNTAS key failure: leaking / weeping connections.

title: Insulation Condition
question: Is pipework and vessel insulation complete and reinstated after past works?
notes: HNTAS key failure: insulation left off after maintenance.

title: Thermal Image
question: Take a thermal image of the element where a camera is available.

title: O&M Documentation
question: Are O&M manuals available for this element?

title: Description of Operation
question: Is a Description of Operation (DoO) available for the control system?
notes: HNTAS: adjustments must accord with the DoO.

title: Planned Maintenance
question: Is planned preventative maintenance (PPM) in place with records available?
notes: HNTAS key failure: PPM not in place or not at sufficient frequency.

title: Maintenance Records Photo
question: Photograph the most recent maintenance / service record.

title: Number of Properties
question: How many properties are served by the network?

title: Number of Buildings
question: How many buildings are on the network?

title: Number of Intake Plantrooms
question: How many intake plantrooms / substations serve the network?

title: Peak Flow Temperature
question: Network peak flow temperature (design or observed operating setpoint).

title: DHW Return Temperature
question: Primary return temperature during DHW production.

title: CH Return Temperature
question: Primary return temperature during central heating.

title: System Height
question: Height from plant room to the highest point served.

title: External Design Temperature
question: External temperature assumed at peak load.

title: Buffer Volume
question: Total installed buffer / thermal store volume.

title: Boiler Fuel
question: Primary boiler fuel (as design options e.g. gas / biomass / electric / oil).

title: Substation Type
question: Substation type where externally supplied (as design options).

title: Heating Emitters
question: Dominant central heating emitter type observed (radiators / underfloor / fan coils).

title: CH Connection
question: Central heating connection arrangement (direct / indirect).

title: Cold Water Supply
question: Cold water service arrangement (mains / boosted / tank).

title: Radiator Flow Control
question: Radiator flow control observed (TRV type).

title: Radiator Return Control
question: Radiator return control observed (RTL type).

title: Plant Room Condition
question: Overall condition of the energy centre / plant room.

title: Ventilation
question: Is plant room ventilation adequate and unobstructed?

title: Drainage
question: Are floor drains / tundishes present and clear?

title: Heat Source Inventory
question: List the heat sources present (type and count e.g. 3x gas boiler + 2x ASHP).

title: Resilience
question: Can the network meet demand with the largest single heat source unavailable (n-1)?

title: Fuel Input Metering (EC1)
question: Is each heat-source fuel input separately metered (gas / electricity per source type)?
notes: HNTAS EC1: sub-metering required where sources share a fuel.

title: Boundary Heat Meter (EC3)
question: Is a heat meter installed at the energy centre boundary measuring total heat export?

title: Pump Electricity Meter (EC4)
question: Is network distribution pump electricity separately metered?
notes: HNTAS EC4; KPI threshold: pump energy ≤ 1.2% of annual heat generation.

title: Top-up Water Meter
question: Is a water meter installed on the network top-up / fill line?
notes: HNTAS key failure: no water meters on top-up.

title: Top-up Meter Reading
question: Record the top-up water meter reading.

title: Make and Model
question: Record the boiler make and model.

title: Data Badge Photo
question: Take a clear photo of the boiler data badge.

title: Rated Output
question: Boiler rated heat output.

title: Year of Manufacture
question: Year of manufacture (from badge or records).

title: Flue Arrangement
question: Flue type and routing (open / room-sealed / fan-flued; note condition).

title: Condition
question: Overall condition of this boiler.

title: Service Record
question: Is there a service record within the last 12 months?

title: Gross Efficiency
question: Stated gross efficiency (badge or literature).
notes: HNTAS threshold ≥ 80% gross for gas/oil boilers.
failtext: Below the HNTAS 80% gross efficiency threshold for gas/oil boilers.

title: Boiler Controls
question: How is the boiler sequenced / controlled (cascade controller / BMS / standalone)?

title: Isolation Valves
question: Are isolation valves present and operable for this boiler?

title: Leaks
question: Any leaks on the boiler or its immediate pipework?

title: Operating Flow Temperature
question: Boiler flow temperature while operating.

title: Operating Return Temperature
question: Boiler return temperature while operating.

title: Make and Model
question: Record the heat pump make and model.

title: Data Badge Photo
question: Take a clear photo of the heat pump data badge.

title: Heat Pump Type
question: Type of heat pump (ASHP / WSHP / GSHP / exhaust).

title: Refrigerant
question: Refrigerant type (from badge e.g. R290 / R32 / R410A).

title: Rated Output
question: Rated heat output at design conditions.

title: Stated COP
question: Stated coefficient of performance at design conditions.
failtext: Below the HNTAS COP threshold of 2.0.

title: Electricity Metering
question: Is heat pump electricity input separately metered?
notes: HNTAS EC1: separate metering per source type.

title: Condition
question: Overall condition (coils / casing / mounts / defrost provision).

title: Noise / Vibration
question: Any abnormal noise or vibration in operation?

title: Service Record
question: Is there an F-Gas / service record within the last 12 months?

title: Make and Model
question: Record the CHP make and model.

title: Electrical Output
question: Rated electrical output.

title: Thermal Output
question: Rated thermal output.

title: Hours Run
question: Hours run (from controller).

title: Quality Index
question: CHPQA Quality Index where known.
failtext: Below the CHPQA Quality Index threshold of 105.

title: Condition
question: Overall condition of the CHP.

title: Make and Model
question: Record the pump make and model.

title: Duty Arrangement
question: Duty arrangement (single / duty-standby / duty-assist).

title: Variable Speed
question: Is the pump inverter / VSD controlled?

title: Control Mode
question: Control mode (fixed speed / constant DP / proportional DP / temperature).

title: DP Test Points
question: Are binder test points available to measure pump differential pressure?

title: Differential Pressure
question: Measure the differential pressure across the pump.
notes: HNTAS key failure: pump DP not appropriate.

title: Glands and Seals
question: Any weeping glands or seal leaks?

title: Standby Rotation
question: Are standby pumps exercised / rotated per maintenance schedule?
notes: HNTAS key failure: ancillary equipment not exercised.

title: Condition
question: Overall pump condition (bearings / corrosion / mounts).

title: Make and Model
question: Record the pressurisation unit make and model.

title: Cold Fill Pressure
question: Cold fill pressure setting.

title: Operating Pressure
question: Observed system operating pressure.

title: Expansion Vessel Size
question: Expansion vessel total volume.

title: Vessel Pre-charge
question: Expansion vessel pre-charge pressure where measurable.

title: Condition
question: Is the pressurisation unit operating correctly (no lockouts / correct pressures)?
notes: HNTAS key failure: pressurisation unit not operating correctly.

title: Alarms
question: Are low/high pressure alarms configured and reporting?

title: Volume
question: Buffer / thermal store volume (badge or documentation).

title: Insulation
question: Is the vessel fully insulated including connections?

title: Hydraulic Configuration
question: How is the buffer connected (2-pipe / 4-pipe / series / parallel)?
notes: HNES eligible measure: thermal storage hydraulic reconfiguration.

title: Temperature Sensors
question: Are store temperature sensors fitted and reporting?

title: Condition
question: Overall condition (corrosion / supports / relief valve).

title: Meter Location
question: Which monitoring point does this meter serve? (e.g. EC boundary / SS intake / SS offtake / CC intake)
notes: HNTAS monitoring points: EC1-EC8 / SS1-SS7 / DD1-DD3 / CC1.

title: Make and Model
question: Record the meter make and model.

title: Serial Number
question: Meter serial number.

title: Accuracy Class
question: Meter accuracy class (from badge e.g. Class 2).

title: Energy Reading
question: Record the cumulative energy reading.

title: Volume Reading
question: Record the cumulative volume reading.

title: Flow Temperature
question: Instantaneous flow temperature at the meter.

title: Return Temperature
question: Instantaneous return temperature at the meter.

title: Flow Rate
question: Instantaneous flow rate at the meter.

title: Error Codes
question: Is the meter free of error codes?
notes: HNTAS key failure: monitoring point faults not rectified.

title: Remote Reading
question: Is the meter connected to remote monitoring (ARMS / M-Bus / wireless)?
notes: HNTAS: 5-30 minute read frequencies require remote reads.

title: Calibration
question: Is the meter within its calibration / recalibration period?

title: Make and Model
question: Record the PHX make and model.

title: Rated Duty
question: Rated duty of the heat exchanger.

title: Primary Flow Temp
question: Primary side flow temperature in operation.

title: Primary Return Temp
question: Primary side return temperature in operation.

title: Secondary Flow Temp
question: Secondary side flow temperature in operation.

title: Secondary Return Temp
question: Secondary side return temperature in operation.

title: Approach Temperature
question: Approach (primary return minus secondary return).

title: Insulation
question: Is the exchanger insulated / jacketed?

title: Condition
question: Overall condition (gaskets / corrosion / supports).

title: Intake Heat Meter (SS1)
question: Is a heat meter installed on the substation INTAKE boundary?
notes: HNTAS SS1: intake metering is required.

title: Offtake Heat Meter (SS2)
question: Is a heat meter installed on the substation OFFTAKE boundary?
notes: HNTAS SS2: offtake metering is required.

title: Pump Energy Meter (SS3)
question: Is substation pump energy metered per pump set?

title: Top-up Water Meter (SS4)
question: Is a water meter installed on the substation top-up line?

title: DP Measurement Points (SS5/SS6)
question: Are defined differential pressure measurement points installed?

title: DP Reading
question: Measure differential pressure at the defined point.

title: Operating Pressure (SS7)
question: Record the substation operating pressure.

title: Route Condition
question: Condition of the distribution route surveyed (corrosion / supports / movement).

title: Bypasses
question: Are any bypasses present? Note locations and whether justified/documented.
notes: HNTAS key failure: unjustified bypasses. Record OK when none or all justified.

title: Access Chambers
question: Are buried access chambers dry and accessible (not flooded)?
notes: HNTAS key failure: access chambers below standard.

title: Leak Detection
question: Is a leak detection / surveillance system installed and functional?
notes: HNTAS key failure: surveillance system not functional.

title: Pipe Sizes
question: Record main distribution pipe sizes observed (DN per section).

title: Route Insulation
question: Is distribution pipework insulation continuous along the surveyed route?

title: Sample Taken
question: Has a water sample been taken for analysis?
notes: HNTAS key failure: water quality sampling not carried out.

title: Inhibitor Dosing
question: Is inhibitor dosing equipment present and in service?

title: Side-stream Filtration
question: Is side-stream filtration (or dirt/air separation) installed?

title: Last Analysis Report
question: Date of last water quality analysis report where available.

title: Control System
question: What control system operates this element (BMS make / standalone controllers)?

title: Setpoints Recorded
question: Are current control setpoints recorded and consistent with the DoO?
notes: HNTAS key failure: unjustified control adjustments.

title: Weather Compensation
question: Is weather compensation active on the network flow temperature?

title: Remote Monitoring (ARMS)
question: Is an automatic remote monitoring system in place and reporting?

title: Alarms
question: Are alarms configured and free of standing/nuisance alarms?
notes: HNTAS key failure: nuisance alerts and standing faults.

title: Time Schedules
question: Are time schedules appropriate (no 24/7 operation where scheduling is intended)?

title: General Notes
question: Any further observations or recommendations for this element.

title: Improvement Opportunities
question: Note candidate improvement measures (HNES categories: controls / pumps / insulation / storage / hydraulics).

title: Gas Detection
question: Is gas detection installed and in test where gas plant is present?

title: Emergency Stops
question: Are emergency stop buttons present and labelled at exits?

title: Safety Valves
question: Are safety/relief valves piped to safe discharge and within test date?

title: Electrical Installation
question: Condition of electrical panels and containment (covers on / no exposed conductors).

title: Electrical Certificate
question: Is an in-date EICR available for the plant space?

title: Gas Safety Certificate
question: Is an in-date gas safety record available where gas plant is present?

title: Safety Signage
question: Is statutory signage in place (hot surfaces / pressurised systems / PPE)?

title: Calorifiers / Cylinders
question: Are calorifiers or DHW storage cylinders present? Note count and volumes.

title: Storage Temperature
question: DHW storage temperature observed.
failtext: Below the 60°C storage temperature expected for legionella control.

title: Legionella Regime
question: Is a legionella monitoring/flushing regime documented?

title: Toilet fitted
question: Is there a toilet fitted in the room?
